title: Candles with Stand, Set of 12 Candles,Bright Color Pastel Cake Candles for Wedding Party Decoration (Purple Blue Green Pink Yellow)
features: 【Package Includes】You will get 2 boxes in total 12pcs tall birthday cake candles with holders, there are 6 fresh colors (green/yellow/pink/purple/blue/light purple). Cute bright color meets the needs of daily parties.

【Safe Thin Candles】The thin cupcake candles are made of smokeless and non-toxic paraffin, stearic acid, environmentally Friendly Pigments and Worsted Cotton Thread. The long colorful candles are safe to use and easy to be lit, you can rest assured that put them on the birthday cake.

【Spiral Candles Size】The total length is about 15cm/5.9inch, the candle part is about 11cm/4.3inch, 4cm/1.5inch with Holder at the end of the candle to insert into the cake. The diameter of thin cupcake candles is about 4mm/0.16inch.

【Makaron Colors】 Eye-catching color, the birthday candles in a simple design are attractive and shiny add an elegant effect and romantic atmosphere to your party. Thin Candles are also very suitable for candlelight dinners with the best lover.

【Wide Application】 Our Tall Birthday Cake Candles are great ornaments for your cakes, suitable for birthday, baby shower, wedding, Chrismas, Valentines Day, festival celebration and any other special occasions. Candles will provide an elegant effect and romantic atmosphere to your party.
description: Product description DESCRIPTION: 1. Our birthday candles are made of smokeless and non-toxic wax. Odorless and environmentally friendly. Easy to insert and light Even and even burning. 2. Birthday Cake Candles are beautiful bold color,lovely, shiny, tall candles can fit your cake well, a good decoration for your birthday cake. 3. Birthday candles are perfect for decorating cupcakes, muffins,cake,and cookies,can be applied to wedding,birthday party,bridal shower,baby shower,family gathering and so on. CHARACTERISTICS: Colour: Green/Yellow/Pink/Purple/Blue/Bright Purple Material: PP Length: 15cm/5.9inch Diameter: 4mm/0.16inch TIPS: Put the cake candles in the fridge and freeze them for a few minutes, then light the candles on top of the cake so the candle-grease doesn't fall off easily. PACKAGE INCLUDING: 12Pcs Twisty Birthday Candles Directions keep clean Safety Warning Warning: Keep away from open flames and children. Do not leave a burning candle unattended. Be sure to extinguish the candle before leaving or before falling asleep. Keep at a safe distance from flammable materials. See more
